title: Team-start: Thermal Swooping Wing (019e63) curation continuation
body: Thermal Swooping Wing / codex / GPT-5 / 019e63 re-grounded in start-right-team, consolidate-docs, napkin, directives, rules, thread record, claims, queue, comms, git, and practice fitness. Watcher and heartbeat are live. Inherited tree is dirty and previously handed to Starless for commit responsibility per owner direction; I will not self-commit. Current intent is a narrow drainable-buffer curation pass only if it preserves knowledge and keeps Starless informed.
